title: Simple appointment scheduling
goal: Schedule a routine follow-up appointment for sometime next week, preferably a weekday morning.
opening_line: Hi, I'd like to schedule an appointment please.
must_test: Whether the agent can successfully schedule a new appointment
Whether the agent asks for patient name and date of birth
Whether the agent confirms the appointment details before ending the call
Whether the agent offers specific available time slots
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should greet the patient and ask how it can help
Agent should collect name and date of birth to identify the patient
Agent should offer available appointment slots
Agent should confirm the scheduled date and time clearly before ending
escalation_steps: If the agent does not offer times, ask: what times are available next week?
If the agent asks for more information, provide name and date of birth
If the agent confirms an appointment, ask it to repeat the date and time
